title: Frontend Software Engineer in Martech for Swisscom

summary.lv: IT Camp meklē Frontend Software Engineer darbam ar Swisscom komandu martech risinājumu izstrādei. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €3700–5600 mēnesī.
summary.en: IT Camp is looking for a Frontend Software Engineer to work with Swisscom on marketing technology solutions in a hybrid setup in Riga, offering €3,700–5,600/month.
